mechanism_narrative: Rising policy rates increase discount rates and compress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating jobless claims signal deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering recession fears that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in consumer credit and elevated inflation erodes real household purchasing power, forcing a downward repricing of consumer discretionary earnings and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when RSAFS declines and CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.5% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization, which boosts corporate profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth correlates negatively with SPX returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below 1.1 million units signals a sharp deceleration in the housing sector, which historically precedes broader economic slowdowns and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are not significantly negative when HOUST drops below 1.100.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strong nonfarm payroll growth and a stable unemployment rate confirm a healthy labor market expansion, supporting sustained consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when GDP growth is below trend.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands aggregate corporate earnings expectations, which directly lifts equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 1.0% while inflation remains sticky above 2.5%, the Federal Reserve is forced to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns turn positive despite FEDFUNDS > 1.0% and CPIAUCSL > 2.5% YoY.
